summary: Backend testing completed for AI Technical Analysis PRO feature. All 12 tests passed (100%). Fixed bug where 1w period caused KeyError for 'support_levels'. Verified all new fields: volume (current, avg, ratio, status, trend), market context (BET change, sentiment, description), liquidity (score, tier, description), and Romanian AI interpretation.
passed_tests: ✅ Analysis includes volume_current, volume_avg, volume_ratio, volume_status, volume_trend
✅ Analysis includes RSI, MA20, MA50, support, resistance, signal, confidence
✅ AI interpretation is comprehensive and in Romanian
✅ Different periods (1w, 1m, 3m) all work correctly after fix
✅ Full response structure contains all expected fields
seed_data_creation: None - tests used real EODHD API data for TLV (Banca Transilvania)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Technical Analysis PRO endpoint fully working. Test token: test_token_223176562fd54dec. Use TLV symbol for testing. All periods (1w, 1m, 3m, 6m, 1y) work. Response includes comprehensive volume, market context, and liquidity data. AI interpretation is generated in Romanian by Emergent LLM integration.

bug_fixed.cause: calculate_support_resistance() returned only support/resistance without support_levels/resistance_levels when data was insufficient (< window*2 days)
bug_fixed.fix: Added support_levels and resistance_levels as empty arrays in the insufficient data return case
